'''''Inamo''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in service after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==History==
It was an early casualty of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], who destroyed it, along with [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] [[Mule 1 (transport)|Mule 1]] with a rocket attack during a resupply operation. The [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] [[Ardent (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Ardent'']] arrived too late to save it, and itself escaped with a badly damaged hull. The scenario was later used as a training simulator for TIE Avenger pilots, including [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
